networks.name: Rakuten Advertising / LinkShare
networks.notes: Primary US network; signup link confirmed active on program page (mid=43469)

networks.name: Impact.com
networks.notes: Second US network — both GET STARTED buttons confirmed live on program page

networks.name: Webgains
networks.notes: Anker Nordics (program ID 310162); 8–15% commission range tiered by product type and volume

networks.name: CueLinks
networks.notes: India/International market; 4.5% payout as of March 2026 listing

networks.name: Indoleads
networks.notes: CPA network; Southeast Asian affiliate reach

commission.type: flat (US/UK/EU); tiered by product type and volume (Nordics)
commission.notes: 8% flat rate on all US transactions confirmed — unchanged across all recent audit cycles. Nordics tiered ceiling of 15% unchanged. SOLIX sub-brand separate at 5%.

creative_assets.notes: Regularly updated banners and text links confirmed. Special coupons and seasonal promotions available. Dedicated affiliate manager for support. Data feed enables programmatic and AI-assisted affiliate placements. No new creative formats detected this cycle.

affiliate_program.payment_terms: Standard network payment terms via Rakuten Advertising / Impact.com; no minimum threshold explicitly stated on program page
restrictions: No simulated purchase patterns or scripts

anker_solix.notes: Separate program for energy/power station sub-brand. 5% commission reflects higher AOV ($200–$3,000+). Standalone content strategy recommended.

ankerwork.notes: Workplace/B2B accessories sub-brand. Commission rate UNCONFIRMED — now 5 CONSECUTIVE AUDIT CYCLES without resolution (last audited 2026-04-20). Direct escalation via affiliate@anker.com is overdue and critical.

anker_referral_program.notes: Consumer-facing referral (10% cash to referrer, 10% discount to referred). Distinct from affiliate program — higher incentive than affiliate rate but consumer-only scope.

superchargers_creator_program.notes: Content creator/influencer bridge. High-quality content creators may be selected for inclusion in the traditional affiliate program. Relevant for social media affiliate recruitment pipeline.

vs_benchmark.commission: above_median — 8% vs 5% category median; upper-mid band vs 12% high
vs_benchmark.network_coverage: strong — 5 networks confirmed (Rakuten, Impact, Webgains, CueLinks, Indoleads)

afare_signals.commission_note: 8% well above 5% category median. Nordics ceiling of 15% is elite tier for the region.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 30 days at category median. Competitive but not class-leading vs brands offering 45–60 day windows.
strengths: 8% flat rate well above 5% category median — strong EPC signal for affiliates
5-network presence (Rakuten + Impact + Webgains + CueLinks + Indoleads) — broadest coverage in category peer group
Dedicated affiliate manager reduces activation friction for content partners
Self-serve creative library (banners, data feeds, custom links) enables rapid deployment
Seasonal coupons and promotions provide content hooks for deal publishers and review sites
SuperChargers creator program bridges social media influencers into traditional affiliate pipeline
Brand trust and product quality reduce pre-sale objections; 2% stated conversion rate above typical CE floor
Late April timing: entering peak season for outdoor charging, power banks, and travel accessories (spring travel + summer prep)
weaknesses: SOLIX sub-brand at 5% creates rate discrepancy vs main Anker 8% — potential affiliate channel confusion
AnkerWork commission rate unconfirmed for FIVE consecutive audit cycles — escalation now critical
CueLinks international rate (4.5%) significantly below US rate — geographic rate fragmentation
No publicly stated payment schedule or minimum payout threshold on program page
30-day cookie at median — competitors with 45–60 day windows hold structural advantage on high-consideration purchases
opportunities: Late April power bank + outdoor charging season = prime affiliate activation window — act now
SOLIX high-AOV products ($200–$3K) yield strong EPC even at 5%; warrants dedicated affiliate content brief
Nordics tiered model (up to 15%) could serve as template to pitch US volume-tier upgrade to Anker affiliate team
AI shopping agent compatibility: data feed availability supports programmatic and agent-mediated affiliate placements
Indoleads SEA presence opens Southeast Asian affiliate market — growing Anker region with rising e-commerce
Consumer referral program (10%) signals brand willingness to invest in incentive structures — leverage for upgrade conversations
threats: Amazon Associates default channel captures most casual Anker buyer traffic ahead of affiliate links
UGREEN (8–15%) and RAVPower (8–20%) offer comparable or higher ceiling commission rates
Multiple sub-brand programs without unified messaging risk fragmenting publisher attention
Flat US rate with no volume tier may not incentivize top-tier publishers vs higher-ceiling alternatives

changes_since_last_audit.changes_detected: None. All program terms stable — 8% commission, 30-day cookie, 5-network footprint, creative asset types unchanged.
notable_observations: Program page GET STARTED buttons confirmed: both Rakuten (linkshare.com, mid=43469) and Impact links live and active
AnkerWork unconfirmed rate now at 5 consecutive cycles — escalation via affiliate@anker.com is critical
No new seasonal promotions or creative formats detected this cycle despite entering peak late-April/May outdoor season
Webgains Nordics tiered rate (8–15%) remains the highest confirmed Anker ceiling globally
Stated '30-day cookies that exceed industry standards' messaging unchanged on program page — consistent brand positioning

benchmark_update: none — consumer_electronics category benchmarks remain valid. Anker 8% US rate already reflected in example_programs. No new category-level data found this cycle warranting update to category-benchmarks.json.
recommended_actions: ESCALATE: Email affiliate@anker.com to resolve AnkerWork commission rate — 5 cycles unresolved, now critical
Activate late-April affiliate content calendar: power banks, outdoor charging, travel chargers — peak window is open NOW
Brief high-AOV SOLIX content partners on separate 5% program with EPC context ($200–$3K AOV = strong per-click earnings)
Evaluate pitch to Anker affiliate team: US volume-tier program modeled on Nordics tiered structure (8–15%) to capture top publishers
Leverage SuperChargers creator program as influencer-to-affiliate recruitment pipeline in partner development playbook
Cross-reference with Mac Bee ACES signal data on Anker brand visibility for full Flywheel composite score update
